# Third-Party Licenses

This project includes dictionary resources generated from SudachiDict source data.

## SudachiDict

- Project: https://github.com/WorksApplications/SudachiDict
- Dictionary types currently used in this repository workflow: core + small CSV sources under `tmp/sudachi_raw`
- Primary license: Apache License, Version 2.0
- Additional legal notices: see `third_party/sudachidict/LEGAL`
- Upstream README states that SudachiDict includes UniDic and a part of NEologd.

Included legal files:
- `third_party/sudachidict/LICENSE-2.0.txt`
- `third_party/sudachidict/LEGAL`

For App Store distribution, keep these notices available from the app's in-app license screen.
Re-verify upstream LICENSE and LEGAL before each release.
